Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**
   Preservation And Reflection Of Parameterized Natural Numbers Objects, by Weak Equivalences.

   In this file, we show that any weak equivalence F : C -> D preserves parameterized natural numbers objects.

   Contents
   1. Image of a PNNO, under F, is a PNNO [weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO]
   2. Weak equivalences preserve PNNNO's, up to isomorphism [weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO']
   3. Weak Equivalences reflect PNNNO's [weak_equiv_reflects_parameterized_NNO]
   4. Preservation of PNNO lift along weak equivalences [weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_parameterized_NNO]

   Remark: Observe that no univalence conditions are needed
 *)


Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Arithmetic.NNO.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Arithmetic.ParameterizedNNO.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Preservation.Binproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Creation.BinProducts.

Local Open Scope cat.


C: category
x, x', y, y': C
i: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
j: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
p: BinProduct C x y
p': BinProduct C x' y'
is_z_isomorphism i
→ is_z_isomorphism j
  → is_z_isomorphism (BinProductOfArrows C p' p i j)


C: category
x, x', y, y': C
i: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
j: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
p: BinProduct C x y
p': BinProduct C x' y'
is_z_isomorphism i
→ is_z_isomorphism j
  → is_z_isomorphism (BinProductOfArrows C p' p i j)

  
C: category
x, x', y, y': C
i: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
j: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
p: BinProduct C x y
p': BinProduct C x' y'
ii: is_z_isomorphism i
jj: is_z_isomorphism j
is_z_isomorphism (BinProductOfArrows C p' p i j)

  
C: category
x, x', y, y': C
i: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
j: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
p: BinProduct C x y
p': BinProduct C x' y'
ii: is_z_isomorphism i
jj: is_z_isomorphism j
C ⟦ p', p ⟧
C: category
x, x', y, y': C
i: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
j: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
p: BinProduct C x y
p': BinProduct C x' y'
ii: is_z_isomorphism i
jj: is_z_isomorphism j
is_inverse_in_precat (BinProductOfArrows C p' p i j)
  ?g

  
C: category
x, x', y, y': C
i: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
j: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
p: BinProduct C x y
p': BinProduct C x' y'
ii: is_z_isomorphism i
jj: is_z_isomorphism j
C ⟦ p', p ⟧
 exact (BinProductOfArrows _ p p' (pr1 ii) (pr1 jj)).
  
C: category
x, x', y, y': C
i: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
j: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
p: BinProduct C x y
p': BinProduct C x' y'
ii: is_z_isomorphism i
jj: is_z_isomorphism j
is_inverse_in_precat (BinProductOfArrows C p' p i j)
  (BinProductOfArrows C p p' (pr1 ii) (pr1 jj))
 exact (binproduct_of_z_iso_inv p p' (_,,ii) (_,,jj)).
Defined.

(** * 1. Image of a PNNO is a PNNO *)
Section WeakEquivalencesPreserveNNOs.

  Context {C D : category}
    {F : C ⟶ D} (F_weq : is_weak_equiv F)
    {T_C : Terminal C} {P_C : BinProducts C} (N_C : parameterized_NNO T_C P_C)
    (P_D : BinProducts D).

  Let T_D : Terminal D
      := weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C.

  Definition weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z
    : D⟦T_D, F N_C⟧
    := #F (parameterized_NNO_Z N_C).
  Let F_Z := weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z.

  Definition weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S
    : D⟦F N_C, F N_C⟧
    := #F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C).
  Let F_S := weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S.

  Context {b' y' : D}
    (z' : D⟦b', y'⟧) (s' : D⟦y', y'⟧)
    {b y : C}
    (i_b : z_iso (F b) b')
    (i_y : z_iso (F y) y').

  Let bp (f : D⟦b', F N_C⟧) : D⟦b', P_D b' (F N_C)⟧
      := BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f.

  Let bp' (f : D⟦F N_C, F N_C⟧) : D⟦P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C)⟧
      := BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f.

  Let A : UU
      := ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y'⟧,
          bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z' × bp' F_S · f = f · s'.

  Let P_D' (x y : C) : BinProduct _ (F x) (F y)
      := make_BinProduct _ _ _ _ _ _ (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq P_C x y).

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
     i_b (identity (F N_C)))

    apply (BinProductOfIsIsos _ _ (P_D' _ _) (P_D _ _) (pr2 i_b) (identity_is_z_iso _)).
  Defined.

  Let z : C⟦b, y⟧
      := fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) _ _ (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y).
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
z' = z_iso_inv i_b · # F z · i_y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
z' = z_iso_inv i_b · # F z · i_y

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
z' =
z_iso_inv i_b
· # F
    (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
       (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) · i_y

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
z' =
z_iso_inv i_b · (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y) · i_y

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
z' =
z_iso_inv i_b
· (i_b · (z' · (inv_from_z_iso i_y · i_y)))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
z' = z_iso_inv i_b · (i_b · (z' · identity y'))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
z' = z_iso_inv i_b · (i_b · z')

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
z' = z_iso_inv i_b · i_b · z'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
z' = identity b' · z'

    now rewrite id_left.
  Qed.

  Let s : C⟦y, y⟧
      := fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) _ _ (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y).
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
s' = inv_from_z_iso i_y · (# F s · i_y)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
s' = inv_from_z_iso i_y · (# F s · i_y)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
s' = inv_from_z_iso i_y · (# F s · i_y)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
s' =
inv_from_z_iso i_y
· (# F
     (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
        (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) · i_y)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
s' =
inv_from_z_iso i_y
· (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y · i_y)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
s' =
inv_from_z_iso i_y
· (i_y · s' · (inv_from_z_iso i_y · i_y))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
s' = inv_from_z_iso i_y · (i_y · s' · identity y')

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
s' = inv_from_z_iso i_y · (i_y · s')

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
s' = inv_from_z_iso i_y · i_y · s'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
s' = identity y' · s'

    now rewrite id_left.
  Qed.

  Let e : C⟦P_C b N_C, y⟧
      := parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s.

  Let ϕ_mod (ϕ : A)
    : D⟦F(P_C b N_C), F y⟧
      := bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y).

  Let inv_F (ϕ : A) : C⟦P_C b N_C, y⟧
      := fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) _ _ (ϕ_mod ϕ).

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
    i_b (identity (F N_C)) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
  (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
    i_b (identity (F N_C)) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
  (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
    i_b (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductPr1 D (P_D b' (F N_C)) = identity b'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
       (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) 
    (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductPr2 D (P_D b' (F N_C)) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
    i_b (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductPr1 D (P_D b' (F N_C)) = identity b'
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
    i_b (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductPr1 D (P_D b' (F N_C)) = identity b'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
        (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C))
      · BinProductPr1 D (P_D b' (F N_C)))) =
identity b'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
        (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C))
      · BinProductPr1 D (P_D b' (F N_C)))) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
?b = identity b'
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
        (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C))
      · BinProductPr1 D (P_D b' (F N_C)))) = ?b

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductPr1 D (P_D b' (F N_C)) = ?t2

        apply (BinProductOfArrowsPr1 _ (P_D _ _) (P_D' _ _)).
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · (BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C) · i_b)) =
identity b'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · (BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C) · i_b)) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
?b = identity b'
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · (BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C) · i_b)) = ?b

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· (BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C) · i_b) = ?t2

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C) · i_b = ?t2

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C) = ?y'

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· # F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C)) = ?y'

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C)) = ?y'

        apply maponpaths, BinProductPr1Commutes.
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b · (# F (identity b) · i_b) =
identity b'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b · i_b = identity b'

      apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
