e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
    i_b (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductPr2 D (P_D b' (F N_C)) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
    i_b (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductPr2 D (P_D b' (F N_C)) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
        (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C))
      · BinProductPr2 D (P_D b' (F N_C)))) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
        (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C))
      · BinProductPr2 D (P_D b' (F N_C)))) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
?b = TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
        (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C))
      · BinProductPr2 D (P_D b' (F N_C)))) = ?b

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductPr2 D (P_D b' (F N_C)) = ?t2

        apply (BinProductOfArrowsPr2 _ (P_D _ _) (P_D' _ _)).
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · (BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C) · identity (F N_C))) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · (BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C) · identity (F N_C))) =
?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
?b = TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · (BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C) · identity (F N_C))) =
?b

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· (BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C) · identity (F N_C)) =
?t2

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C) · identity (F N_C) =
?t2

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C) = ?y'

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· # F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C)) = ?y'

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C)) = ?y'

        apply maponpaths, BinProductPr2Commutes.
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · identity (F N_C)) = TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· # F (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· # F (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b · # F (TerminalArrow T_C b)
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N_C) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i_b · # F (TerminalArrow T_C b) =
TerminalArrow T_D b'

      apply (TerminalArrowUnique T_D).
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
· inv_F ϕ = z

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
· inv_F ϕ = z

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · inv_F ϕ) = # F z

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
       (bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y))) = # F z


    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
       (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) = # F z

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D

F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'

BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧

→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))

  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· # F
    (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
       (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) = # F z

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y) = # F z


    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
?b = # F z

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
?b = # F z

      apply pathsinv0, functor_on_fully_faithful_inv_hom.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y) =
i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y


    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
z_iso_inv i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) =
z_iso_inv i_b · (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y)


    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'

BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧

→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧

bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
z_iso_inv i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y =
z_iso_inv i_b · i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'

BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
z_iso_inv i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
?b = z_iso_inv i_b · i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
z_iso_inv i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y = ?b

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
z_iso_inv i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· bp'' · pr1 ϕ = ?y'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
z_iso_inv i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· bp'' · pr1 ϕ =
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · pr1 ϕ

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
z_iso_inv i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· bp'' = bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z)

      exact reflection_parameterized_NNO_helper.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y =
z_iso_inv i_b · i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
z' = z_iso_inv i_b · i_b · z'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
z_iso_inv i_b · i_b · z' = z'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
