i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
  (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C) · inv_F ϕ =
inv_F ϕ · s

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
  (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C) · inv_F ϕ =
inv_F ϕ · s

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C) · inv_F ϕ) =
# F (inv_F ϕ · s)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
       (bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y))) =
# F
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
     (bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) · s)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'

BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧

BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
       (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) =
# F
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
     (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y) · s)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· # F
    (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
       (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) =
# F
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
     (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y) · s)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· # F
    (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
       (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
?b =
# F
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom 
     (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
     (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y) · s)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· # F
    (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
       (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) = ?b

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
     (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) = ?t2

      apply functor_on_fully_faithful_inv_hom.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y) =
# F
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
     (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y) · s)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧

BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y) =
# F
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
     (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) · # F s

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
?b =
# F
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom 
     (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
     (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) · 
# F s

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
?b =
# F
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
     (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) · # F s

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
?y =
# F
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y
     (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y))

      apply pathsinv0, functor_on_fully_faithful_inv_hom.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y) =
bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y · # F s


    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y) · i_y =
bp'' · pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y · # F s · i_y

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · (inv_from_z_iso i_y · i_y))) =
bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · (inv_from_z_iso i_y · (# F s · i_y)))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
     i_b (identity (F N_C)) · (pr1 ϕ · identity y')) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C))
· (pr1 ϕ · (inv_from_z_iso i_y · (# F s · i_y)))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
     i_b (identity (F N_C)) · pr1 ϕ) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C))
· (pr1 ϕ · (inv_from_z_iso i_y · (# F s · i_y)))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
     i_b (identity (F N_C)) · pr1 ϕ) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
?b =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) 
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C))
· (pr1 ϕ · (inv_from_z_iso i_y · (# F s · i_y)))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
?b =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C))
· (pr1 ϕ · (inv_from_z_iso i_y · (# F s · i_y)))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
?t1 = inv_from_z_iso i_y · (# F s · i_y)

      apply s_vs_s'.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
     i_b (identity (F N_C)) · pr1 ϕ) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C)) · (pr1 ϕ · s')

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
     i_b (identity (F N_C)) · pr1 ϕ) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C)) · (bp' F_S · pr1 ϕ)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
    i_b (identity (F N_C)) · pr1 ϕ =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C)) · bp' F_S · pr1 ϕ

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
    i_b (identity (F N_C)) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C)) · bp' F_S

    apply reflection_parameterized_NNO_helper'.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
inv_F ϕ = parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
inv_F ϕ = parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
C ⟦ b, y ⟧
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
C ⟦ y, y ⟧
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
· inv_F ϕ = ?zy
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) 
  (parameterized_NNO_S N_C) · 
inv_F ϕ = inv_F ϕ · ?sy
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
· parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s = 
?zy
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) 
  (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
· parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s =
parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · ?sy

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
C ⟦ b, y ⟧
 exact z.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
C ⟦ y, y ⟧
 exact s.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
· inv_F ϕ = z
 apply reflection_parameterized_NNO_mor_Z.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
  (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C) · inv_F ϕ =
inv_F ϕ · s
 apply reflection_parameterized_NNO_mor_S.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ: A
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
· parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s = z
 apply parameterized_NNO_mor_Z.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
