  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b
      · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) = 
# F z
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
· BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_Z N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b
      · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) = 
# F z
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C)) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_Z N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b
      · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) = 
# F z
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F
     (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
        (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C))
   · # F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C))) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_Z N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b
      · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) = 
# F z
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
       (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
     · BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C)) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_Z N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b
      · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) = 
# F z
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· # F (TerminalArrow T_C b · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_Z N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b
      · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) = 
# F z
inv_from_z_iso i_b
· (# F (TerminalArrow T_C b)
   · # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_Z N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b
      · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) = 
# F z
inv_from_z_iso i_b · # F (TerminalArrow T_C b)
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N_C) =
TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_Z N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b
      · parameterized_NNO_Z N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) = 
# F z
inv_from_z_iso i_b · # F (TerminalArrow T_C b) =
TerminalArrow T_D b'

      apply (TerminalArrowUnique T_D).
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
bp' F_S · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor =
weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor · s'

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
bp' F_S · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor =
weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor · s'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
bp' F_S · (inv_from_z_iso bp'' · # F e · i_y) =
inv_from_z_iso bp'' · # F e · i_y · s'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
bp' F_S · (inv_from_z_iso bp'' · # F e · i_y) =
inv_from_z_iso bp'' · # F e · i_y · s'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
bp' (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (inv_from_z_iso bp'' · # F e · i_y) =
inv_from_z_iso bp'' · # F e · i_y · s'


    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D

F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
bp' (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (inv_from_z_iso bp'' · # F e) · i_y =
inv_from_z_iso bp'' · # F e · i_y · s'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
bp' (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (inv_from_z_iso bp'' · # F e) =
inv_from_z_iso bp'' · # F e · i_y · s'
· inv_from_z_iso i_y

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
bp' (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (inv_from_z_iso bp'' · # F e) =
inv_from_z_iso bp''
· (# F e · (i_y · (s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y)))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
inv_from_z_iso bp''
· (# F e · (i_y · (s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y))) =
bp' (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (inv_from_z_iso bp'' · # F e)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F e · (i_y · (s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) =
bp''
· (bp' (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
   · (inv_from_z_iso bp'' · # F e))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s)
· (i_y · (s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) =
bp''
· (bp' (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
   · (inv_from_z_iso bp''
      · # F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s)))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D

F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'

BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧

bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)

z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s)
· (i_y · (s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)

  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧

  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧

fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧

  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
bp''
· (bp' (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
   · (inv_from_z_iso bp''
      · # F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s)))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s)
· (i_y · (s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s)
· (i_y · (s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y)) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) · # F s

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
i_y · (s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y) = # F s

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y = # F s

      apply pathsinv0, functor_on_fully_faithful_inv_hom.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
bp''
· (bp' (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
   · (inv_from_z_iso bp''
      · # F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s)))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· # F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
bp''
· (bp' (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
   · (inv_from_z_iso bp''
      · # F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s)))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· # F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
bp'' · bp' (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· inv_from_z_iso bp''
· # F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)) =
bp'' · bp' (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· inv_from_z_iso bp''


      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)) =
(BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
   i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
 BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) (identity (F N_C))
   (P_D' b N_C) (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
   (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
    (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
       (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
     BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) (identity (F N_C))
       (P_D' b N_C) (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
       (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
    (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D' b N_C) (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (pr12 i_b) (identity (F N_C))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
    (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D' b N_C) (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (pr12 i_b) (identity (F N_C)) =
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))


      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
    (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D' b N_C) (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (pr12 i_b) (identity (F N_C)) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
?b =
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
    (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D' b N_C) (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (pr12 i_b) (identity (F N_C)) = ?b

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
    (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)) = ?y'

        exact (! reflection_parameterized_NNO_helper').
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
    i_b (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D' b N_C) (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (pr12 i_b) (identity (F N_C)) =
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
    i_b (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D' b N_C) (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (pr12 i_b) (identity (F N_C)) =
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· identity (F (P_C b N_C))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
     i_b (identity (F N_C))
   · BinProductOfArrows D (P_D' b N_C)
       (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr12 i_b) (identity (F N_C))) =
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C))
· identity (F (P_C b N_C))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
