i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D' b N_C) (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (pr12 i_b) (identity (F N_C)) =
identity (F (P_C b N_C))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D' b N_C) (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (pr12 i_b) (identity (F N_C)) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
?b = identity (F (P_C b N_C))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C) i_b
  (identity (F N_C))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D' b N_C) (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (pr12 i_b) (identity (F N_C)) = ?b

        apply (postcompWithBinProductArrow _ (P_D' _ _) (P_D _ _)).
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductArrow D (P_D' b N_C)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C) · i_b · pr12 i_b)
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C) · identity (F N_C)
   · identity (F N_C)) = identity (F (P_C b N_C))


      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductArrow D (P_D' b N_C)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C) · i_b · pr12 i_b)
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C) · identity (F N_C)
   · identity (F N_C)) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
?b = identity (F (P_C b N_C))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductArrow D (P_D' b N_C)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C) · i_b · pr12 i_b)
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C) · identity (F N_C)
   · identity (F N_C)) = ?b

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C) · i_b · pr12 i_b = ?y'

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C) · (i_b · pr12 i_b) = ?y'

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
i_b · pr12 i_b = ?t2

        apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i_b).
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductArrow D (P_D' b N_C)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C) · identity (F b))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C) · identity (F N_C)
   · identity (F N_C)) = identity (F (P_C b N_C))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
BinProductArrow D (P_D' b N_C)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C)) =
identity (F (P_C b N_C))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf:= maponpaths # F
  (parameterized_NNO_mor_S N_C b y z s): # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s) =
# F (parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s · s)
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D' b N_C)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D' b N_C))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D' b N_C))

      use (BinProductArrowUnique _ _ _ (P_D' _ _)) ; apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
A

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
A

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z)
· weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor = z'
× bp' F_S · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor =
  weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor · s'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z)
· weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor = z'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
bp' F_S · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor =
weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor · s'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z)
· weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor = z'
 exact weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor_Z.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
F_Z:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z: D ⟦ T_D, F N_C ⟧
F_S:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b, y: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
bp:= λ f : D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ b', F N_C ⟧ → D ⟦ b', P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
bp':= λ f : D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧,
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b') f: D ⟦ F N_C, F N_C ⟧
→ D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), P_D b' (F N_C) ⟧
A:= ∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
bp (TerminalArrow T_D b' · F_Z) · f = z'
× bp' F_S · f = f · s': UU
P_D':= λ x y : C,
make_BinProduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F (P_C x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C x y)))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_chosen_binproducts F_weq
     P_C x y): ∏ x y : C, BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
bp'':= BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
  (P_D' b N_C) i_b (identity (F N_C)),,
BinProductOfIsIsos (pr1 i_b) 
  (identity (F N_C)) (P_D' b N_C)
  (P_D b' (F N_C)) (pr2 i_b)
  (identity_is_z_iso (F N_C)): z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D b' (F N_C))
z:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) b y
  (i_b · z' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) y y
  (i_y · s' · inv_from_z_iso i_y): C ⟦ y, y ⟧
e:= parameterized_NNO_mor N_C b y z s: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
ϕ_mod:= λ ϕ : A, bp'' · (pr1 ϕ · inv_from_z_iso i_y): A → D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧
inv_F:= λ ϕ : A,
fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) y (ϕ_mod ϕ): A → C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
bp' F_S · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor =
weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor · s'
 exact weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor_S.
  Defined.

End WeakEquivalencesPreserveNNOs.


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
is_parameterized_NNO
  (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) P_D (F N_C)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z F_weq N_C)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S N_C)


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
is_parameterized_NNO
  (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) P_D (F N_C)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z F_weq N_C)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S N_C)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
∃! f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
  (TerminalArrow
     (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) b'
   · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z F_weq
       N_C) · f = z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
    (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S N_C) · f =
  f · s'


  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
(∑ a : C, z_iso (F a) b')
→ ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
  BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
    (TerminalArrow
       (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) b'
     · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z F_weq
         N_C) · f = z'
  × BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
      (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
      (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
    · f = f · s'

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
∃! f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
  (TerminalArrow
     (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) b'
   · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z F_weq
       N_C) · f = z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
    (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S N_C) · f =
  f · s'

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
(∑ a : C, z_iso (F a) y')
→ ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
  BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
    (TerminalArrow
       (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) b'
     · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z F_weq
         N_C) · f = z'
  × BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
      (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
      (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
    · f = f · s'

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
y: C
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
∃! f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
  (TerminalArrow
     (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) b'
   · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z F_weq
       N_C) · f = z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
    (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S N_C) · f =
  f · s'


  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
y: C
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
isaprop
  (∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
   BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
     (TerminalArrow
        (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) b'
      · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z F_weq
          N_C) · f = z'
   × BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
       (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
       (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
     · f = f · s')
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
y: C
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) 
  (identity b')
  (TerminalArrow
     (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) b'
   · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z F_weq
       N_C) · f = z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
    (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S N_C) · f =
  f · s'

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
y: C
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
isaprop
  (∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
   BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
     (TerminalArrow
        (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) b'
      · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z F_weq
          N_C) · f = z'
   × BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
       (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
       (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
     · f = f · s')
 exact (img_of_nno_uvp_uniqueness F_weq N_C P_D z' s' i_b i_y).
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
P_D: BinProducts D
b', y': D
z': D ⟦ b', y' ⟧
s': D ⟦ y', y' ⟧
b: C
i_b: z_iso (F b) b'
y: C
i_y: z_iso (F y) y'
∑ f : D ⟦ P_D b' (F N_C), y' ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
  (TerminalArrow
     (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) b'
   · weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z F_weq
       N_C) · f = z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D b' (F N_C))
    (P_D b' (F N_C)) (identity b')
    (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S N_C) · f =
  f · s'
 apply (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_existence F_weq N_C P_D z' s' i_b i_y).
Defined.


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
T_D: Terminal D
P_D: BinProducts D
parameterized_NNO T_D P_D

F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C

parameterized_NNO T_D P_D

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
T_D: Terminal D
P_D: BinProducts D
is_M_D:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO F_weq
  N_C P_D: is_parameterized_NNO
  (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) P_D
  (F N_C)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z
     F_weq N_C)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S
     N_C)
parameterized_NNO T_D P_D

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
T_D: Terminal D
P_D: BinProducts D
is_M_D:= weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO F_weq
  N_C P_D: is_parameterized_NNO
  (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) P_D
  (F N_C)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z
     F_weq N_C)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S
     N_C)
M_D:= make_parameterized_NNO (F N_C)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z F_weq
     N_C)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S N_C)
  is_M_D: parameterized_NNO
  (weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C) P_D
parameterized_NNO T_D P_D

  exact (parameterized_NNO_independent_of_terminal M_D T_D).
Defined.


(** * 2. Weak equivalences preserve PNNNO's *)

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fw: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
T_D: Terminal D
P_D: BinProducts D
N_D: parameterized_NNO T_D P_D
preserves_parameterized_NNO N_C N_D F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal F Fw)


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fw: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
T_D: Terminal D
P_D: BinProducts D
N_D: parameterized_NNO T_D P_D
preserves_parameterized_NNO N_C N_D F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal F Fw)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fw: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
T_D: Terminal D
P_D: BinProducts D
N_D: parameterized_NNO T_D P_D
M_D':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO Fw N_C T_D P_D: parameterized_NNO T_D P_D
preserves_parameterized_NNO N_C N_D F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal F Fw)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fw: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
N_C: parameterized_NNO T_C P_C
T_D: Terminal D
P_D: BinProducts D
N_D: parameterized_NNO T_D P_D
M_D':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO Fw N_C T_D P_D: parameterized_NNO T_D P_D
i:= parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N_D M_D': z_iso N_D M_D'
preserves_parameterized_NNO N_C N_D F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal F Fw)

  exact (is_z_isomorphism_path (idpath _) (pr2 i)).
Defined.

(** * 3. Weak Equivalences reflect PNNNO's *)
Section WeakEquivalencesReflectPNNO.

  Context  {C D : category} {F : C ⟶ D} (F_weq : is_weak_equiv F)
    {T_C : Terminal C} {P_C : BinProducts C}
    {P_D : BinProducts D}.

  Context (N_C : C) (z_C : C⟦T_C, N_C⟧) (s_C : C⟦N_C, N_C⟧).

  Let T_D : Terminal D
      := weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C.

  Let N_D : D := F N_C.
  Let z_D : D⟦T_D, N_D⟧ := #F z_C.
  Let s_D : D⟦N_D, N_D⟧ := #F s_C.

  Context (N_D_p : is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D).

  Let P_Fb_FN (b : C) : BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
      := preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P_C b N_C).

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z' <->
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
# F z'

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z' <->
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
# F z'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
# F z'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
# F z'

F: C ⟶ D

T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C

s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧

N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧

P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) = 
?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧

N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
?b = # F z'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧

N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D

preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
?b = # F z'
 apply maponpaths, pf. 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C)) · # F f

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f =
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C)) · # F f

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) =
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
?b =
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
?b =
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C))

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C)) = ?b

        use (preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_arrow _ _ (P_C _ _) (P_D _ _)).
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) (F N_C))
  (# F (identity b)) (# F (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) (F N_C))
  (# F (identity b)) (# F (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C))
· BinProductArrow D
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P_C b N_C))
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) (F N_C))
  (# F (identity b)) (# F (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
identity (F b) = # F (identity b)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧

N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D =
# F (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C

s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧

s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D

preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧

pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
identity (F b) = # F (identity b)
 apply pathsinv0, functor_id.
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C

z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
