preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D =
# F (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D =
# F (TerminalArrow T_C b) · # F z_C

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
TerminalArrow T_D (F b) = # F (TerminalArrow T_C b)

        apply pathsinv0, (TerminalArrowUnique T_D).
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z'
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f) = # F z'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C)) · # F f =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C)) · # F f =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
# F
  (BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C)) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) (F N_C))
  (# F (identity b)) (# F (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) (F N_C))) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) (F N_C))
  (# F (identity b)) (# F (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C))
· BinProductArrow D
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P_C b N_C))
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C))) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) (F N_C))
  (# F (identity b)) (# F (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C)) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)) (identity (F b))
  (# F (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C)) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
# F (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) =
TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
# F (TerminalArrow T_C b) · # F z_C =
TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
pf: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) = # F z'
# F (TerminalArrow T_C b) = TerminalArrow T_D (F b)

      apply (TerminalArrowUnique T_D).
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
  (identity b) s_C · f = f · s' <->
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f · # F s'

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
  (identity b) s_C · f = f · s' <->
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f · # F s'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
  (identity b) s_C · f = f · s'
→ BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (identity (F b)) s_D
  · (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
       (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
       (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
  BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f · # F s'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
→ BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
    (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
  f · s'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
  (identity b) s_C · f = f · s'
→ BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (identity (F b)) s_D
  · (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
       (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
       (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
  BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f · # F s'
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f · # F s'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r:= maponpaths # F p_l: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C · f) = 
# F (f · s')
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f · # F s'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f · # F s'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
D
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
z_iso ?w (P_D (F b) N_D)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
?g
· (BinProductOfArrows D 
     (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D) 
     (identity (F b)) s_D
   · (BinProductArrow D 
        (P_Fb_FN b) (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
        (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
      # F f)) =
?g
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f · # F s')

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
z_iso ?w (P_D (F b) N_D)
 apply (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso _ (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)). 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) ?BP
  (P_D (F b) N_D)
· (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
     (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
   · (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
        (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
        (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) ?BP
  (P_D (F b) N_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f
   · # F s')

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
  (P_D (F b) N_D)
· (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
     (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
   · (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
        (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
        (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f)) =
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) s_C) · # F f
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
# F f · # F s' =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) 
  (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f · # F s')

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
  (P_D (F b) N_D)
· (BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
     (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
   · (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
        (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
        (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f)) =
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) s_C) · # F f

F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
  (P_D (F b) N_D)
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f =
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) s_C) · # F f

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧

N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
  (P_D (F b) N_D)
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) =
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) s_C)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
  (P_D (F b) N_D)
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
?b =
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
?b =
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) s_C)

          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) s_C) = ?b

          apply (preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_arrow _ _ (P_C _ _) (P_D _ _)).
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
  (P_D (F b) N_D)
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) (F N_C))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C) · identity b))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C) · s_C))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) (F N_C))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C) · identity b))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C) · s_C))
· BinProductArrow D
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P_C b N_C))
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (identity (F b)) s_D =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) (F N_C))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C) · identity b))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C) · s_C))

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C)) · identity (F b))
  (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)) · s_D) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) (F N_C))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C) · identity b))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C) · s_C))

F: C ⟶ D

T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C

s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D

preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'

  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C)) · identity (F b) =
# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C) · identity b)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)) · s_D =
# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C) · s_C)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C)) · identity (F b) =
# F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C) · identity b)
 now rewrite functor_comp, functor_id.
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)) · s_D =
# F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C) · s_C)
 now rewrite functor_comp.
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
# F f · # F s' =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
  (P_D (F b) N_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f
   · # F s')
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) · (# F f · # F s') =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
  (P_D (F b) N_D)
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f
   · # F s')

F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧

N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) · # F f · # F s' =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
  (P_D (F b) N_D)
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f · # F s'

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
  (P_D (F b) N_D)
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· BinProductArrow D p
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) · BinProductPr1 D p =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · BinProductPr1 D p)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) · BinProductPr2 D p =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) 
  (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · BinProductPr2 D p)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) · BinProductPr1 D p =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · BinProductPr1 D p)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) · BinProductPr1 D p = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
?b =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) 
  (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · BinProductPr1 D p)

          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
?b =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · BinProductPr1 D p)

            
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D p (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
· BinProductPr1 D p = ?t1

            apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ p).
          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) · BinProductPr1 D p =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D)

          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) · BinProductPr1 D p =
# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))

          apply id_left.
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧

z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'

  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) · BinProductPr2 D p =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · BinProductPr2 D p)

# F f = # F f · # F s'

F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D

preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧

  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f =

# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
?b =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) 
  (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · BinProductPr2 D p)

          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
?b =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · BinProductPr2 D p)

            
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D p (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
· BinProductPr2 D p = ?t1

            apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ p).
          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) · BinProductPr2 D p =
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (# F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))) (# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))
· BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)

          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
q_r: # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C) · 
# F f = # F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
identity (F (P_C b N_C)) · BinProductPr2 D p =
# F (pr221 (P_C b N_C))

          apply id_left.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f · # F s'
→ BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
    (identity b) s_C · f = f · s'
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
  (identity b) s_C · f = f · s'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) s_C · f) = # F (f · s')

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧

N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) s_C) · # F f = # F f · # F s'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧

N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
