  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
D
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
z_iso ?w (F (P_C b N_C))
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
?g
· (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C 
        (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
        (identity b) s_C) · 
   # F f) = ?g · (# F f · # F s')

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
z_iso ?w (F (P_C b N_C))
 apply z_iso_inv, (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso _ (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P_C _ _) (P_D _ _)). 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
        (identity b) s_C) · # F f) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· (# F f · # F s')


      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
        (identity b) s_C) · # F f) =
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· (# F f · # F s')

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
       (identity b) s_C) · # F f =
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C))) · # F f
· # F s'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
       (identity b) s_C) · # F f =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
       (identity b) s_C) · # F f =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · # F f

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
       (identity b) s_C) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
       (identity b) s_C) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D p
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
       (identity b) s_C · pr121 (P_C b N_C)) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D p
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
· # F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C 
       (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
       (identity b) s_C · pr221 
     (P_C b N_C)) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D p
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
· # F (pr221 (P_C b N_C))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
       (identity b) s_C · pr121 (P_C b N_C)) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D p
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
· # F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
       (identity b) s_C · pr121 (P_C b N_C)) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
?b =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D p
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
· # F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
       (identity b) s_C · pr121 (P_C b N_C)) = ?b

          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
  (identity b) s_C · pr121 (P_C b N_C) = ?t2

          apply BinProductOfArrowsPr1.
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C) · identity b) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D p
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
· # F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C)) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D p
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
· # F (pr121 (P_C b N_C))

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧

N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C)) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · # F (pr121 (P_C b N_C)))

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C)) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
?b =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · # F (pr121 (P_C b N_C)))

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧

preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
?b =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · # F (pr121 (P_C b N_C)))

          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D p (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
· # F (pr121 (P_C b N_C)) = ?t1

          apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ p).
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C)) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D)

   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))

  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
?b =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F (BinProductPr1 C (P_C b N_C)) = ?b

          apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ p).
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)) =
BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D) · identity (F b)

        apply pathsinv0, id_right.
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
       (identity b) s_C · pr221 (P_C b N_C)) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D p
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
· # F (pr221 (P_C b N_C))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
       (identity b) s_C · pr221 (P_C b N_C)) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
?b =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D p
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
· # F (pr221 (P_C b N_C))

F: C ⟶ D

s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
       (identity b) s_C · pr221 (P_C b N_C)) = ?b

          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
  (identity b) s_C · pr221 (P_C b N_C) = ?t2

          apply BinProductOfArrowsPr2.
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C) · s_C) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductArrow D p
    (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
    (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
· # F (pr221 (P_C b N_C))

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C) · s_C) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · # F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F

     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))

  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
