?b =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · # F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
?b =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D p
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
   · # F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)))

          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D p (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
· # F (pr221 (P_C b N_C)) = ?t1

          apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ p).
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C) · s_C) =
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C) · s_C) =
BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D) · s_D

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C)) · # F s_C =
BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D) · s_D

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
q_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
     (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
     (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
   # F f) =
BinProductArrow D (P_Fb_FN b)
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) N_D))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)) · 
# F f · # F s'
p:= P_Fb_FN b: BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P_C b N_C))
  (BinProductPr1 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
  (BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) (F N_C)))
· # F (BinProductPr2 C (P_C b N_C)) =
BinProductPr2 D (P_D (F b) N_D)

        apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ p).
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
is_parameterized_NNO T_C P_C N_C z_C s_C

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
is_parameterized_NNO T_C P_C N_C z_C s_C

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
∏ (b y : C) (zy : C ⟦ b, y ⟧) (sy : C ⟦ y, y ⟧),
∃! f : C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
    (identity b) s_C · f = f · sy

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
∃! f : C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z'
× BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
    (identity b) s_C · f = f · s'


    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
∃! f : C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z'
× BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
    (identity b) s_C · f = f · s'

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
(∑ f : C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧,
 BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
   (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z'
 × BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) s_C · f = f · s')
≃ (∑ f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
   BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
     (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D) · f = # F z'
   × BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
       (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
     f · # F s')


    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧,
   BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · x = z'
   × BinProductOfArrows C 
       (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
       (identity b) s_C · x = 
     x · s')
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
isPredicate
  (λ y0 : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
   BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
     (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
   · y0 = # F z'
   × BinProductOfArrows D 
       (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
       (identity (F b)) s_D · y0 = 
     y0 · # F s')
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
∏ x : C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧,
(λ x0 : C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧,
 BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
   (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · x0 = z'
 × BinProductOfArrows C 
     (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
     (identity b) s_C · x0 = 
   x0 · s') x <->
(λ y0 : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
 BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
   (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
 · y0 = # F z'
 × BinProductOfArrows D 
     (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D) 
     (identity (F b)) s_D · y0 = 
   y0 · # F s') (?w x)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
D ⟦ F (P_C b N_C), F y ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
z_iso (P_D (F b) N_D) (F (P_C b N_C))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
z_iso (F (P_C b N_C)) (P_D (F b) N_D)

      apply (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso _ (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)).
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧,
   BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · x = z'
   × BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
       (identity b) s_C · x = x · s')
 intro ; apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
isPredicate
  (λ y0 : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
   BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
     (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D) · y0 = # F z'
   × BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
       (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · y0 =
     y0 · # F s')
 intro ; apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
∏ x : C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧,
(λ x0 : C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧,
 BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
   (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · x0 = z'
 × BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) s_C · x0 = x0 · s') x <->
(λ y0 : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
 BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
   (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D) · y0 = # F z'
 × BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
     (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · y0 =
   y0 · # F s')
  ((z_iso_comp_right_weq
      (z_iso_inv
         (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
            (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
            (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
    ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
        y)%weq x)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
(λ x : C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧,
 BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
   (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · x = z'
 × BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
     (identity b) s_C · x = x · s') f <->
(λ y0 : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
 BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
   (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D) · y0 = # F z'
 × BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
     (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · y0 =
   y0 · # F s')
  ((z_iso_comp_right_weq
      (z_iso_inv
         (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
            (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
            (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
    ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
        y)%weq f)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z'
× BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
    (identity b) s_C · f = f · s'
→ BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
    (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
  · (z_iso_comp_right_weq
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
             (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
             (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
     ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
         y)%weq f = # F z'
  × BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
      (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
    · (z_iso_comp_right_weq
         (z_iso_inv
            (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
               (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
               (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
       ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
           (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f =
    (z_iso_comp_right_weq
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
             (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
             (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
     ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
         y)%weq f · # F s'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
     (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq
    f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
  · (z_iso_comp_right_weq
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
             (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
             (P_C b N_C) 
             (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
       (F y)
     ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
         (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f =
  (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
     (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq
    f · # F s'
→ BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
    (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z'
  × BinProductOfArrows C 
      (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C) 
      (identity b) s_C · f = 
    f · s'

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z'
× BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
    (identity b) s_C · f = f · s'
→ BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
    (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
  · (z_iso_comp_right_weq
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
             (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
             (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
     ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
         y)%weq f = # F z'
  × BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
      (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
    · (z_iso_comp_right_weq
         (z_iso_inv
            (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
               (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
               (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
       ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
           (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f =
    (z_iso_comp_right_weq
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
             (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
             (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
     ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
         y)%weq f · # F s'
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
p_r: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq
    f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (identity (F b)) s_D
  · (z_iso_comp_right_weq
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
             (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
             (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
     ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
         y)%weq f =
  (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq
    f · # F s'

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
p_r: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq
    f = # F z'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
p_r: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
     (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq
    f =
(z_iso_comp_right_weq
   (z_iso_inv
      (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
         (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
         (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
   (F y)
 ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq
  f · # F s'

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
p_r: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq
    f = # F z'
 exact (pr1 (equiv_on_zero_mor f) p_l).
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) 
  (identity b) (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f =
z'
p_r: BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'
BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b)) s_D
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq
    f =
(z_iso_comp_right_weq
   (z_iso_inv
      (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
         (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
         (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
 ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq
  f · # F s'
 exact (pr1 (equiv_on_succ_mor f) p_r).
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq
    f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D) (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (identity (F b)) s_D
  · (z_iso_comp_right_weq
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
             (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
             (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
     ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C)
         y)%weq f =
  (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq
    f · # F s'
→ BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
    (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z'
  × BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
      (identity b) s_C · f = f · s'
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
              F_weq) (P_C b N_C) 
           (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
     (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
       (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f = 
# F z'
p_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
              F_weq) (P_C b N_C) 
           (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
     (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
       (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f =
(z_iso_comp_right_weq
   (z_iso_inv
      (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
         (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
         (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
   (F y)
 ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
     (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f · 
# F s'
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z'
× BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
    (identity b) s_C · f = f · s'

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
              F_weq) (P_C b N_C) 
           (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
     (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
       (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f = 
# F z'
p_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
              F_weq) (P_C b N_C) 
           (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
     (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
       (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f =
(z_iso_comp_right_weq
   (z_iso_inv
      (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
         (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
         (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
   (F y)
 ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
     (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f · 
# F s'
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
              F_weq) (P_C b N_C) 
           (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
     (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
       (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f = 
# F z'
p_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
              F_weq) (P_C b N_C) 
           (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
     (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
       (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f =
(z_iso_comp_right_weq
   (z_iso_inv
      (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
         (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
         (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
   (F y)
 ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
     (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f · 
# F s'
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) 
  (P_C b N_C) (identity b) s_C · f = 
f · s'

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
              F_weq) (P_C b N_C) 
           (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
     (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
       (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f = 
# F z'
p_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
              F_weq) (P_C b N_C) 
           (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
     (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
       (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f =
(z_iso_comp_right_weq
   (z_iso_inv
      (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
         (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
         (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
   (F y)
 ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
     (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f · 
# F s'
BinProductArrow C (P_C b N_C) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T_C b · z_C) · f = z'
 exact (pr2 (equiv_on_zero_mor f) p_l).
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
T_C: Terminal C
P_C: BinProducts C
P_D: BinProducts D
N_C: C
z_C: C ⟦ T_C, N_C ⟧
s_C: C ⟦ N_C, N_C ⟧
T_D:= weak_equiv_creates_terminal F_weq T_C: Terminal D
N_D:= F N_C: D
z_D:= # F z_C: D ⟦ T_D, N_D ⟧
s_D:= # F s_C: D ⟦ N_D, N_D ⟧
N_D_p: is_parameterized_NNO T_D P_D N_D z_D s_D
P_Fb_FN:= λ b : C,
preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P_C b N_C): ∏ b : C, BinProduct D (F b) (F N_C)
b, y: C
z': C ⟦ b, y ⟧
s': C ⟦ y, y ⟧
q:= N_D_p (F b) (F y) (# F z') (# F s'): ∃! f : D ⟦ P_D (F b) N_D, F y ⟧,
BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D) 
  (identity (F b)) (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· f = # F z'
× BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
    (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D · f =
  f · # F s'
f: C ⟦ P_C b N_C, y ⟧
p_l: BinProductArrow D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (identity (F b))
  (TerminalArrow T_D (F b) · z_D)
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
              F_weq) (P_C b N_C) 
           (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
     (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
       (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f = 
# F z'
p_r: BinProductOfArrows D (P_D (F b) N_D)
  (P_D (F b) N_D) (identity (F b)) s_D
· (z_iso_comp_right_weq
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
              F_weq) (P_C b N_C) 
           (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
     (F y)
   ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
       (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f =
(z_iso_comp_right_weq
   (z_iso_inv
      (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
         (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
         (P_C b N_C) (P_D (F b) N_D))) 
   (F y)
 ∘ weq_from_fully_faithful 
     (pr2 F_weq) (P_C b N_C) y)%weq f · 
# F s'
BinProductOfArrows C (P_C b N_C) (P_C b N_C)
  (identity b) s_C · f = f · s'
 exact (pr2 (equiv_on_succ_mor f) p_r).
  Defined.

End WeakEquivalencesReflectPNNO.

(** * 4. Weak Equivalences Lift Preservation of PNNO. *)
Section WeakEquivalencesLiftPreservesPNNO.

  Context {C1 C2 C3 : category}
    {F : C1 ⟶ C3} {G : C1 ⟶ C2} {H : C2 ⟶ C3}
    (α : nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F)
    (G_weq : is_weak_equiv G)
    {Fpt : preserves_terminal F}
    {T1 : Terminal C1} {T2 : Terminal C2} {T3 : Terminal C3}
    {P1 : BinProducts C1} {P2 : BinProducts C2} {P3 : BinProducts C3}
    (N1 : parameterized_NNO T1 P1) (N2 : parameterized_NNO T2 P2) (N3 : parameterized_NNO T3 P3)
    (Fpn : preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt).

  
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
parameterized_NNO T2 P2

  
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
parameterized_NNO T2 P2

    exact (weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2 P2).
  Defined.

  Let H_pt : preserves_terminal H
      := weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt.

  Let F_z : C3⟦T3, F N1⟧
      := TerminalArrow (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3 · # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1).
  Let F_s : C3⟦F N1, F N1⟧
      := (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N1)).

  Let F_hn : C3⟦F N1, H N2⟧
      := nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
           · # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2).

  Let H_z : C3⟦T3, H N2⟧
      := TerminalArrow (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3 · # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2).
  Let H_s : C3⟦H N2, H N2⟧
      := # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2).

  
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
Terminal C3

  
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
Terminal C3

    
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
isTerminal C3 (H (G T1))

    
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
isTerminal C2 (G T1)

    
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
is_weak_equiv G
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
isTerminal C1 T1

G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F

T2: Terminal C2

P2: BinProducts C2

N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
is_weak_equiv G
 assumption.
    
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
isTerminal C1 T1
 apply T1.
  Defined.

  
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s · F_hn =
parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (H N2) H_z H_s

C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧

  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
BinProductArrow C3 (P3 T3 N3) 
  (identity T3)
  (TerminalArrow T3 T3 · parameterized_NNO_Z N3)
· (parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s · F_hn) =
?zy

F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3

N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3

  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2

  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3

· # H

T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
BinProductOfArrows C3 (P3 T3 N3) 
  (P3 T3 N3) (identity T3) 
  (parameterized_NNO_S N3)
· (parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s · F_hn) =
parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s · F_hn
· ?sy

  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2

  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3

  (P3 T3 N3) (identity T3) 
  (parameterized_NNO_S N3)

N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2

  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2

  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3

H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3

 exact H_s.
    
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
BinProductArrow C3 (P3 T3 N3) (identity T3)
  (TerminalArrow T3 T3 · parameterized_NNO_Z N3)
· (parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s · F_hn) =
H_z
 
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
BinProductArrow C3 (P3 T3 N3) (identity T3)
  (TerminalArrow T3 T3 · parameterized_NNO_Z N3)
· parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s · F_hn =
H_z

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
F_z · F_hn = H_z

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
   · # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2)) =
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F

T2: Terminal C2

P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧

  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧

T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2) =
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2) = 
?b
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
?b =
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)

N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3

N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2

  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3

  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3

  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1

F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F

P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3

N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3

N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2

· # H

T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1 = 
?y'

F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F

Fpt: preserves_terminal F

N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3

  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2

  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧

· # H

  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· (# F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
   · nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1) =
?y'

        
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
# F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1 = 
?t2

        apply nat_trans_ax.
      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· (pr1 (nat_z_iso_inv α) T1
   · # (G ∙ H) (parameterized_NNO_Z N1))
· # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2) =
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α T1)
   · # H (# G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)))
· # H
    (is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
       (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)
       (parameterized_NNO_S N2)) =
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)

N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2

  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧

F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧

T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α T1)
   · (# H (# G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1))
      · # H
          (is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
             (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)
             (parameterized_NNO_S N2)))) =
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)

F: C1 ⟶ C3

H: C2 ⟶ C3

P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3

N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3

N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2

F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧

F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧

  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧

T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
# G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2 (pr12 N2)
    (pr122 N2) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1) · parameterized_NNO_Z N2

· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧

· # H

· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧

T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
tmp: # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2 
    (pr12 N2) (pr122 N2) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1) · parameterized_NNO_Z N2
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α T1)
   · (# H (# G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1))
      · # H
          (is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
             (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)
             (parameterized_NNO_S N2)))) =

  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)
