P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
# G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1)
· (let X :=
     λ T T' : Terminal C2, pr1 (z_iso_Terminals T T')
     in
   X T2 (weak_equiv_creates_terminal G_weq T1))
· parameterized_NNO_Z
    (make_parameterized_NNO (G N1)
       (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_Z G_weq
          N1)
       (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO_S N1)
       (weak_equiv_preserves_parameterized_NNO G_weq
          N1 P2))

        
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
# G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1)
· TerminalArrow (weak_equiv_creates_terminal G_weq T1)
    T2 · # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)

        
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
identity (G T1) · # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1)
· TerminalArrow (weak_equiv_creates_terminal G_weq T1)
    T2 · # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)

F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧

F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H

· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧

T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
identity (G T1) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1)
· TerminalArrow (weak_equiv_creates_terminal G_weq T1)
    T2

F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3

Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
isaprop (C2 ⟦ G T1, G T1 ⟧)

        
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
iscontr (C2 ⟦ G T1, G T1 ⟧)

        apply (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal _ G_weq _ (pr2 T1) _).
      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
tmp: # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2 
    (pr12 N2) (pr122 N2) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1) · parameterized_NNO_Z N2
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α T1)
   · (# H (# G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1))
      · # H
          (is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
             (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)
             (parameterized_NNO_S N2)))) =
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)


      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
tmp: # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2 
    (pr12 N2) (pr122 N2) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1) · parameterized_NNO_Z N2
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α T1)
   · # H
       (# G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
        · is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
            (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)
            (parameterized_NNO_S N2))) =
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
tmp: # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2 
    (pr12 N2) (pr122 N2) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1) · parameterized_NNO_Z N2
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α T1)
   · # H
       (# G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
        · is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
            (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)
            (parameterized_NNO_S N2))) = ?b
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
tmp: # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2 
    (pr12 N2) (pr122 N2) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1) · parameterized_NNO_Z N2
?b =
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)
 
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
tmp: # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2 
    (pr12 N2) (pr122 N2) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1) · parameterized_NNO_Z N2
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α T1)
   · # H
       (# G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
        · is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
            (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)
            (parameterized_NNO_S N2))) = ?b

        
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
tmp: # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2 
    (pr12 N2) (pr122 N2) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1) · parameterized_NNO_Z N2
# G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
    (parameterized_NNO_Z N2) (parameterized_NNO_S N2) =
?t2

        exact tmp.
      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
tmp: # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2 
    (pr12 N2) (pr122 N2) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1) · parameterized_NNO_Z N2
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α T1)
   · # H
       (TerminalArrow T2 (G T1)
        · parameterized_NNO_Z N2)) =
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
tmp: # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2 
    (pr12 N2) (pr122 N2) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1) · parameterized_NNO_Z N2
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α T1)
   · (# H (TerminalArrow T2 (G T1))
      · # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2))) =
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
tmp: # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2 
    (pr12 N2) (pr122 N2) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1) · parameterized_NNO_Z N2
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α T1)
· # H (TerminalArrow T2 (G T1))
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2) =
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
tmp: # G (parameterized_NNO_Z N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2 
    (pr12 N2) (pr122 N2) =
TerminalArrow T2 (G T1) · parameterized_NNO_Z N2
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α T1)
· # H (TerminalArrow T2 (G T1)) =
TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3

      apply (TerminalArrowUnique (preserves_terminal_to_terminal _ H_pt T2)).
    
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
BinProductOfArrows C3 (P3 T3 N3) (P3 T3 N3)
  (identity T3) (parameterized_NNO_S N3)
· (parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s · F_hn) =
parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s · F_hn
· H_s
 
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
BinProductOfArrows C3 (P3 T3 N3) (P3 T3 N3)
  (identity T3) (parameterized_NNO_S N3)
· parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s · F_hn =
parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s · F_hn
· H_s

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s · F_s
· F_hn =
parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s · F_hn
· H_s

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s
· (F_s · F_hn) =
parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1) F_z F_s
· (F_hn · H_s)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
F_s · F_hn = F_hn · H_s

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
# F (parameterized_NNO_S N1)
· (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
   · # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2)) =
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2)
· # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
# F (parameterized_NNO_S N1)
· nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2) =
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2)
· # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
nat_z_iso_inv α N1
· # (G ∙ H) (parameterized_NNO_S N1)
· # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2) =
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2)
· # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
nat_z_iso_inv α N1
· (# (G ∙ H) (parameterized_NNO_S N1)
   · # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2)) =
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· (# H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2)
   · # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2))

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
# (G ∙ H) (parameterized_NNO_S N1)
· # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2) =
# H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2)
· # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
# H (# G (parameterized_NNO_S N1))
· # H
    (is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
       (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)
       (parameterized_NNO_S N2)) =
# H
  (is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
     (parameterized_NNO_Z N2) (parameterized_NNO_S N2))
· # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
# H
  (# G (parameterized_NNO_S N1)
   · is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
       (parameterized_NNO_Z N2)
       (parameterized_NNO_S N2)) =
# H
  (is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
     (parameterized_NNO_Z N2) (parameterized_NNO_S N2)
   · parameterized_NNO_S N2)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
# G (parameterized_NNO_S N1)
· is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
    (parameterized_NNO_Z N2) (parameterized_NNO_S N2) =
is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor N2' N2
  (parameterized_NNO_Z N2) (parameterized_NNO_S N2)
· parameterized_NNO_S N2

      apply (is_NNO_parameterized_NNO_mor_S N2').
    
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
BinProductArrow C3 (P3 T3 N3) (identity T3)
  (TerminalArrow T3 T3 · parameterized_NNO_Z N3)
· parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (H N2) H_z H_s = H_z
 apply parameterized_NNO_mor_Z.
    
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
BinProductOfArrows C3 (P3 T3 N3) (P3 T3 N3)
  (identity T3) (parameterized_NNO_S N3)
· parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (H N2) H_z H_s =
parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (H N2) H_z H_s · H_s
 apply parameterized_NNO_mor_S.
  Qed.

  
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
preserves_parameterized_NNO N2 N3 H H_pt

     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3

C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧

  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
?f = preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N2 N3 H H_pt
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
is_z_isomorphism ?f

    
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
C3 ⟦ N3, H N2 ⟧

N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2

  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H

· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧

T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧

  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2' ⟧

      exact (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1).
    
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N1 N3 F Fpt
· (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
   · # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2)) =
preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N2 N3 H H_pt
 
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
BinProductArrow C3 (P3 T3 N3) (TerminalArrow T3 N3)
  (identity N3)
· parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1)
    (TerminalArrow
       (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
     · # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1))
    (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N1))
· (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
   · # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2)) =
BinProductArrow C3 (P3 T3 N3) (TerminalArrow T3 N3)
  (identity N3)
· parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (H N2)
    (TerminalArrow
       (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
     · # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2))
    (# H (parameterized_NNO_S N2))

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
BinProductArrow C3 (P3 T3 N3) (TerminalArrow T3 N3)
  (identity N3)
· (parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1)
     (TerminalArrow
        (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
      · # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1))
     (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N1))
   · (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
      · # H
          (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2))) =
BinProductArrow C3 (P3 T3 N3) (TerminalArrow T3 N3)
  (identity N3)
· parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (H N2)
    (TerminalArrow
       (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
     · # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2))
    (# H (parameterized_NNO_S N2))

      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (F N1)
  (TerminalArrow
     (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
   · # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1))
  (# F (parameterized_NNO_S N1))
· (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
   · # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2)) =
parameterized_NNO_mor N3 T3 (H N2)
  (TerminalArrow
     (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
   · # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2))
  (# H (parameterized_NNO_S N2))

      apply weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_parameterized_NNO_comm.
    
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
is_z_isomorphism
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N1 N3 F Fpt
   · (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
      · # H
          (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2)))
 
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
is_z_isomorphism
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N1 N3 F Fpt)

  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1

C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
is_z_isomorphism
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N1 N3 F Fpt)
 apply Fpn. 
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
is_z_isomorphism
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
   · # H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2))

F: C1 ⟶ C3

H: C2 ⟶ C3

T3':= H (G T1),,

  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
is_z_isomorphism
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1)
 apply (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1).
      
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F

Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1

P1: BinProducts C1

N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3

N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧

  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧

T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
is_z_isomorphism
  (# H (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2))
 
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
Fpt: preserves_terminal F
T1: Terminal C1
T2: Terminal C2
T3: Terminal C3
P1: BinProducts C1
P2: BinProducts C2
P3: BinProducts C3
N1: parameterized_NNO T1 P1
N2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
N3: parameterized_NNO T3 P3
Fpn: preserves_parameterized_NNO N1 N3 F Fpt
N2':= weak_equiv_creates_parameterized_NNO G_weq N1 T2
  P2: parameterized_NNO T2 P2
H_pt:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_terminal α G_weq Fpt: preserves_terminal H
F_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal F Fpt T1) T3
· # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N1): C3 ⟦ T3, F N1 ⟧
F_s:= # F (parameterized_NNO_S N1): C3 ⟦ F N1, F N1 ⟧
F_hn:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) N1
· # H
    (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2): C3 ⟦ F N1, H N2 ⟧
H_z:= TerminalArrow
  (preserves_terminal_to_terminal H H_pt T2) T3
· # H (parameterized_NNO_Z N2): C3 ⟦ T3, H N2 ⟧
H_s:= # H (parameterized_NNO_S N2): C3 ⟦ H N2, H N2 ⟧
T3':= H (G T1),,
H_pt (G T1)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_terminal G G_weq T1
     (let X := pr2 T1 in X)): Terminal C3
is_z_isomorphism
  (parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso N2' N2)

        apply parameterized_NNO_unique_up_to_iso.
  Qed.

End WeakEquivalencesLiftPreservesPNNO.
